items.claim: Yair Rodriguez has a significant issue with his activity level.
items.quote: Yair's biggest issue is the activity for sure, bro.

items.claim: Pico is a bad stylistic matchup for Zalewski.
items.quote: Pico's a bad match up for Zalewski.

items.claim: Pico's wrestling ability is a significant problem for all of his opponents.
items.quote: Pico's wrestling is a problem for everybody.

items.claim: Bobby Green is at high risk of being knocked out early by Terrance McKinney due to his habit of keeping his hands low.
items.quote: I worry about Green getting knocked out early with the chaos... Green doesn't put his hands up, bro.

items.claim: Bobby Green has a significant advantage if the fight against Terrance McKinney goes past three minutes.
items.quote: If it goes past three minutes, Green's got it.

items.claim: Fiziev attempted a 145-pound weight cut at the Performance Institute and was unable to complete it.
items.quote: Fiziev, so I heard that he tried to do a 145-lb cut at the PI and he couldn't do it.

items.claim: Fiziev's Muay Thai skills are spectacular.
items.quote: Fiziev's Muay Thai is nothing short of spectacular, bro.
